description: Use this API to remove a branch device model attached to the specified branch. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = cctbrndmod_remove(ibus, jbus, id)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; Not Allowed by default).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; Not Allowed by default).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Circuit identifier. (input; Not Allowed by default).

error_codes.description: no branch device model on the branch.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
